title: Media can't be judge, jury, executioner: Karnataka HC bars media trial against actor Darshan
description: The Karnataka High Court recently issued a directions to curb sensationalised media reporting on the murder case against Kannada actor Darshan Thogudeepa [Darshan Srinivas v Union of India & Ors].Justice Sachin Shankar Magadum passed the ruling on a plea filed by Darshan to curb media trials against him. In the April 30 verdict, the judge found that the content flagged by Darshan reflected a disturbing trend where the media had made a spectacle of pending court proceedings. "The broadcast me
